Simple process

Sell or trade in 3 easy steps

The whole process takes under an hour. Most sellers are paid the same day they drop off.

01

Get your offer

Enter your licence plate or VIN and vehicle condition. Receive a real offer estimate in as little as 2 minutes, with no commitment required.

02

Book your appointment

Choose a free drop-off appointment at a Planet Motors location. Pickup may also be available in select areas across Canada.

03

Get paid on the spot

A quick 15-minute inspection, a few documents, and you're paid on the spot by certified cheque or EFT to your bank.

Payment process

How you get paid

1

Bring your documents

We walk you through the paperwork: ownership transfer, void cheque for EFT. It takes minutes.

2

Quick vehicle confirmation

A fast ~15 minute inspection to confirm the vehicle matches the submitted details. No pressure, no surprises.

3

Get paid on the spot

Payment is arranged immediately upon confirmation. You hand us the keys, we hand you your money.

Payment options

Certified cheque or EFT/direct deposit to your Canadian bank account. Same day whenever possible.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything sellers want to know before they book.

How do I sell my car online with Planet Motors?
+

Enter your licence plate or VIN, select your vehicle condition, receive a real no-obligation offer estimate in as little as 2 minutes, and book your drop-off appointment. Our team confirms your final offer on the spot.

Can I sell my vehicle without buying one from Planet Motors?
+

Yes. You can sell your car directly to Planet Motors without purchasing another vehicle from us. There is absolutely no obligation to buy.

What are your drop-off locations across Canada?
+

Ontario: Richmond Hill, Brampton, Ottawa, Windsor, Kitchener. Quebec: Montreal, Quebec City. New Brunswick: Moncton. Nova Scotia: Halifax. Newfoundland: Paradise. Manitoba: Winnipeg. Saskatchewan: Saskatoon. Alberta: Calgary, Edmonton. Pickup may also be available depending on your location.

How and when will I get paid?
+

You get paid at your appointment once your vehicle details are confirmed and documents are signed. Payment options include certified cheque and EFT/direct deposit to your Canadian bank account, same day whenever possible.

Will my offer change after I receive it?
+

Your offer is valid for 7 days. If the submitted information accurately matches the vehicle condition and details, your offer remains the same. We believe in transparent, firm pricing with no last-minute changes.

Is Planet Motors OMVIC licensed?
+

Yes. Planet Motors is a registered OMVIC dealer. We operate under Ontario's Motor Vehicle Dealers Act, giving you full consumer protection as a seller.

Our Story

About Planet Motors

Our Story and Mission: Fairness. Integrity.

Used Luxury Cars & EVs in Richmond Hill

Planet Motors is a Richmond Hill dealership specializing in used EVs, Teslas, and quality pre-owned vehicles. We serve buyers across the GTA and customers throughout Canada, with a process that works entirely online or in person.

We built Planet Motors around a simpler way to buy a used vehicle. Fair pricing, clear information, and a process that respects your time.

Here's What Makes Us Different:

  • ✓No hidden fees. No sales pressure. No surprise markups.
  • ✓Below-market, pre-negotiated pricing on all vehicles.
  • ✓Canada-wide delivery, from Toronto to Vancouver and everywhere in between.
  • ✓Multilingual service team: English, French, Mandarin, Arabic, Punjabi, Spanish, Hindi, Farsi.
  • ✓Free 3-Month Powertrain Warranty on qualifying vehicles.
  • ✓Full Vehicle History Disclosure. No secrets, no surprises.
  • ✓No cash surcharge. Debit and credit cards are always welcome.

Standard warranty

Our core warranty includes extensive coverage to ensure you are completely protected for up to 90 days or 6,000 km, whichever comes first.

✓
What parts are covered?
  • Engine
  • Transmission
  • Drive axle
  • Suspension
  • Electrical components
  • Brakes
  • Fuel system
  • Sensors and wiring
  • Heating & air conditioning
  • Steering
✕
What parts are not covered?
  • Replaceable / Wearable components
  • Recommended maintenance
  • Interior or cosmetic imperfections
  • Aftermarket accessories
✓
Direct billing
Repair costs are paid directly to authorized facilities to save you out-of-pocket expenses.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

How can we help?

🛒 Buying a Car
💰 Financing
🔄 Selling & Trade-In
🚗 Delivery & Pickup
🛡️ Warranty & Protection
⚡ EVs & Teslas
No results found. Try different keywords.

🛒 Buying a Car

Yes. Every vehicle goes through our 210-point PM Certified™ inspection before it's listed. You'll find the full inspection report on each vehicle's listing page.
Yes. You can browse inventory, apply for financing, sign documents electronically, and arrange delivery, all without visiting the dealership. We serve customers across Ontario and Canada-wide.
No. At Planet Motors, the price is the price, whether you pay cash or finance. There are no cash surcharges, ever.
Yes, we offer a 10-day money-back guarantee on all purchases. If you're not satisfied for any reason, we'll take the car back, no questions asked.
Our prices reflect fair market value from the start. We don't pad them to leave room for negotiation — what you see is what you pay.
Yes. All our listed prices include the OMVIC fee. Prices exclude HST and licensing fees, which are standard government charges.

💰 Financing

Yes. We work with multiple lenders including Eden Park/Fairstone, OCM Auto Financing, Gold Drive, CIBC Auto Finance, and National Bank to find solutions for all credit situations, including new to Canada, self-employed, and past bankruptcies.
In many cases, $0 down is available for qualified buyers. Down payment requirements vary by lender and credit profile. Our finance team will find the best option for you.
Most approvals happen within a few hours — often the same day. We'll reach out with your options as soon as we hear back from our lenders.
A full credit application does result in a hard inquiry. However, multiple inquiries within a short window (14–45 days) are typically counted as one by credit bureaus. We recommend applying once you're ready to proceed.

🔄 Selling & Trade-In

Yes. We purchase vehicles outright — no purchase from us required. The offer tool gives you an instant estimate. Once submitted, our team confirms a final offer within a few hours, usually the same business day.
Click "Sell or Trade" in the navigation and fill out the short form with your vehicle details. We'll review and contact you with an offer. The process takes about 2 minutes.
Yes. Your trade-in value is applied directly to reduce the purchase price of your new vehicle, which can also lower your financing amount and monthly payments.

🚗 Delivery & Pickup

Yes. We deliver to your door across Ontario and can arrange delivery to other provinces. Delivery is free with Planet Care™ packages, and available for a fee on other purchase options.
We're at 30 Major Mackenzie Dr E, Richmond Hill, ON L4C 1G7. We're open Mon–Fri 9AM–7PM and Sat 9AM–6PM. Sunday we are closed.
Yes. You can always arrange a pickup at our Richmond Hill location. Just give us a call at 1-866-797-3332 to schedule a convenient time.

🛡️ Warranty & Protection

Every vehicle comes with our Standard Warranty covering 90 days or 6,000 km, whichever comes first. This covers engine, transmission, brakes, electrical, suspension, fuel system, and more.
Yes. We offer extended warranty coverage through iA Financial Group, with plans up to 3 or 5 years / 60,000–100,000 km. Ask about adding it to your purchase during checkout.
Our PM Certified™ 210-point inspection covers everything from VIN verification and Carfax history, to powertrain, brakes, suspension, tires, interior, exterior, EV battery health, and a full test drive evaluation. You can view the complete report on any vehicle's page.

⚡ EVs & Teslas

Select financed Teslas come with up to 6 months of Full Self-Driving (FSD) included as part of our March 2026 promotion. Check individual listings for details, or ask our team.
Yes. Battery state of health is one of our 210 inspection points. We verify battery capacity and flag any degradation. All our EVs are inspected to ensure the battery performs to specifications.
Yes. All our EVs support Level 1 (standard outlet) and Level 2 (240V) home charging. We can advise on home charger installation and typical charge times for any vehicle in our inventory.
We work with lenders who offer competitive EV financing rates. Depending on the province, additional government rebates may apply on top of financing. Contact our team to discuss current incentives.

Still have a question?

Our team is available Mon–Sat. Call, text, or send us a message.

Call 1-866-797-3332

🔍 VIN & History: Items 1–10
#Inspection ItemStatus
1VIN verified (door jamb, dash, frame)✓ Pass
2Lien search: no outstanding liens✓ Pass
3CARFAX Canada history report clear✓ Pass
4All outstanding recalls cleared✓ Pass
5RCMP/CPIC stolen vehicle check: clear✓ Pass
6Odometer accuracy verified✓ Pass
7Clean Ontario title: no branding✓ Pass
8No flood or water damage history✓ Pass
9Airbag deployment history: none✓ Pass
10Structural integrity: no frame damage✓ Pass
⚙️ Powertrain & Engine: Items 11–32
#Inspection ItemStatus
11Engine oil level & condition✓ Pass
12Transmission fluid level & condition✓ Pass
1312V battery load test ≥ 75% capacity✓ Pass
14Alternator output & charging system✓ Pass
15Water pump: no leaks or noise✓ Pass
16Ignition system & spark plugs✓ Pass
17Fuel system: no leaks, proper pressure✓ Pass
18Radiator & coolant system✓ Pass
19Coolant level & freeze protection✓ Pass
20A/C system: cold air output verified✓ Pass
21No oil, coolant, or fluid leaks✓ Pass
22Belts & hoses: no cracks or wear✓ Pass
🛞 Brakes, Suspension & Steering: Items 33–45
#Inspection ItemStatus
33Master cylinder & brake fluid level✓ Pass
34Front brake pad thickness ≥ 4mm✓ Pass
35Rear brake pad thickness ≥ 4mm✓ Pass
36Rotors & drums: no scoring or warping✓ Pass
37Brake calipers: no leaks, proper movement✓ Pass
38Brake lines & hoses: no damage✓ Pass
39Parking brake function verified✓ Pass
40Springs & shock absorbers: no leaks✓ Pass
41Control arm bushings & ball joints✓ Pass
42CV joints & axle boots✓ Pass
43Steering rack & tie rods✓ Pass
44Power steering fluid & pump operation✓ Pass
45Wheel bearings: no noise or play✓ Pass
🔵 Tyres & Wheels: Items 46–53
#Inspection ItemStatus
46Tread depth all four tyres ≥ 4/32"✓ Pass
47No uneven wear, bulges or cracks✓ Pass
48Tyre pressure set to spec✓ Pass
49Alloy rims: no cracks or bends✓ Pass
50Valve stems & caps intact✓ Pass
51Lug nuts torqued to spec✓ Pass
52TPMS sensors functional✓ Pass
53Spare tyre & jack kit present✓ Pass
🚘 Vehicle Exterior: Items 54–78
#Inspection ItemStatus
54–57Exhaust system & Ontario emissions✓ Pass
58–62All exterior lights: headlights, tail, signal, fog✓ Pass
63–65Door locks, handles & hinges✓ Pass
66–68Windshield & glass: no chips, cracks✓ Pass
69–71Body panels: no damage, rust or corrosion✓ Pass
72–75Wipers, mirrors, bumpers & trim✓ Pass
76–78Hood, trunk & fuel door operation✓ Pass
🪑 Vehicle Interior: Items 79–98
#Inspection ItemStatus
79–82Instrument cluster & all warning lights✓ Pass
83–85Infotainment, navigation & Bluetooth✓ Pass
86–88All seats: power, heat, fold function✓ Pass
89–91Seatbelts, airbag system & SRS light✓ Pass
92–94HVAC, defroster & cabin air filter✓ Pass
95–98USB ports, horn, key fob & owner's manual✓ Pass
🏁 How It Drives: Items 99–108
#Inspection ItemStatus
99Cold start & idle quality✓ Pass
100Transmission: smooth shifts all gears✓ Pass
101Braking performance: straight stop✓ Pass
102Acceleration & throttle response✓ Pass
103No abnormal suspension noise✓ Pass
104Drivetrain: no vibration or clunking✓ Pass
10510 km road test completed✓ Pass
106ADAS features: lane assist, AEB verified✓ Pass
107Regen braking function (EV/hybrid)✓ Pass
108No warning lights at end of road test✓ Pass
⚡ EV & Hybrid Systems: Items 109–120
#Inspection ItemStatus
109High-voltage battery SOH & SOC✓ Pass
110Battery management system (BMS): no faults✓ Pass
111Charge port: no damage, latches correctly✓ Pass
112L1 & L2 charging verified✓ Pass
113DC fast charging (if equipped)✓ Pass
114HV cables & connectors: no damage✓ Pass
115Electric motor: no noise or fault codes✓ Pass
116Battery thermal management system✓ Pass
117On-board charger (OBC) function✓ Pass
118Autopilot / FSD hardware (Tesla)✓ Pass
119Software version: latest OTA update✓ Pass
120Energy consumption within range spec✓ Pass
✨ Detailing, Safety & Advanced: Items 121–210
#Inspection ItemStatus
121–130Paint depth measurement: OEM thickness confirmed✓ Pass
131–138Dent & paintwork inspection: PDR where required✓ Pass
139–143Clay bar, paint correction & ceramic coat prep✓ Pass
144–150Full interior detail: vacuum, shampoo, odour elimination✓ Pass
151–160Ontario SSC safety standards certificate issued✓ Pass
161–170OMVIC disclosure package prepared & signed✓ Pass
171–180All keys, remotes & charge cables present✓ Pass
181–190OBD-II full diagnostic: zero fault codes✓ Pass
191–200Advanced safety systems: camera, radar, park sensors✓ Pass
201–210Final QC sign-off by certified Planet Motors technician✓ Pass
